en_title: Take-Two Boss Says 'Former Rockstar Employees' Have Tried to Match GTA's Success and Failed — and We All Know Which Game He's Talking About
cn_title: Take-Two老板暗讽前Rockstar员工挑战GTA失败

paragraphs.en: Strauss Zelnick, boss of GTA 6 publisher Take-Two Interactive, has discussed the difficulties of developing a hit video game — and dropped what sounds like a obvious nod to MindsEye in the process.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》发行商Take-Two Interactive的老板施特劳斯·泽尼克(Strauss Zelnick)谈到了开发爆款游戏的困难,过程中似乎对《《心之眼》》做了一次明显的暗讽。

paragraphs.en: MindsEye is, of course, the notorious first game from Build a Rocket Boy — the studio set up by former Rockstar veteran Leslie Benzies. After years in development and enormous metaverse ambitions, MindsEye ultimately arrived as a buggy and poorly-received flop, resulting in hundreds of layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: 《《心之眼》》正是Build a Rocket Boy工作室那部臭名昭著的处女作。这家工作室的创始人莱斯利·本齐斯(Leslie Benzies)是Rockstar的老兵。经过多年开发、怀揣宏大的元宇宙野心,《《心之眼》》最终却作为一款Bug满天飞、口碑崩盘的烂作发售,导致数百人被裁员。

paragraphs.en: "Making hits seems to get harder and harder and harder as entertainment industries mature," Zelnick said, speaking at the TD Cowen 54th Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. "The folks at Rockstar seem to be able to make these massive hits, and lots of other people have tried. Lots and lots, including former Rockstar employees. And so far, they haven't been able to do it."
paragraphs.cn: 「随着娱乐产业的成熟,做出爆款似乎变得越来越难了。」泽尼克在TD Cowen第54届年度科技、传媒与电信大会上说道,「Rockstar的人似乎总能做出这种现象级爆款,很多人想复制——非常非常多人,包括前Rockstar员工。但到目前为止,他们都没能做到。」

paragraphs.en: "Doesn't mean they can't in the future, by the way," Zelnick continued. "We're always running scared. But it won't be technology that changes the game. What'll change is that some extraordinarily creative individual or individuals will show up and do something astonishing. Our goal is to get those people to work within the Take-Two system. If we fail to do that, we fail."
paragraphs.cn: 「当然这不代表他们将来做不到,」泽尼克接着说,「我们始终保持危机感。但改变这一切的不会是技术,而是某个或某些非凡的创意天才出现,做出惊艳的东西。我们的目标就是让这些人愿意在Take-Two的体系内工作。如果做不到,那我们就失败了。」

paragraphs.en: 99 Details in the GTA 6 Trailer - Slideshow

Zelnick went on to discuss the long wait for GTA 6 — and painted the gap between releases in the series as something of a strength. Unlike other video game publishers, Zelnick said, he had ensured that Take-Two had never tried to annualize its franchises (outside of its sports games). In other words, he wasn't trying to replicate Activision's demands for an annual Call of Duty blockbuster, or Ubisoft's past push for annual Assassin's Creed adventures.
paragraphs.cn: 泽尼克随后谈到《GTA6》漫长的等待——并把系列发售之间的间隔描述为一种优势。他表示,与其他游戏发行商不同,他始终确保Take-Two除体育游戏外从不让旗下系列年货化。换言之,他不会效仿动视每年都要推出一部《使命召唤》大作,也不会像育碧过去那样把《刺客信条》变成年货。

paragraphs.en: "Our plan might not be to have a specific cadence around our properties because we're not a cadence-driven company, we never have been," Zelnick said. "I didn't show up at Take-Two nearly 20 years ago and say, the way everyone else was, 'We're going to annualize our products like clockwork...' I was an outlier at the time."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们的策略不是围绕作品设定固定节奏,因为我们从来不是一家被节奏驱动的公司,」泽尼克说,「将近20年前我刚到Take-Two时,我没有像其他人那样说『我们要把产品像钟表一样年度化』。当时我就是个异类。」

paragraphs.en: "I'm not going to name the properties," he continued, "but we've seen that some very competitive properties have had good annual releases and bad annual releases because it's just so hard to do. GTA was not the number one property [when I joined in 2007]. It was a top five property, but it was not the number one property. And take a look at what happened to the properties that were higher up in the food chain that were annualized to see what happens."
paragraphs.cn: 「我不点名,」他继续说,「但我们都看到了——一些很有竞争力的IP搞年货化,有时表现不错,有时翻车,因为这事真的太难做了。我2007年加入时,《GTA》还不是Take-Two的头号IP——它当时只能算前五,而不是第一。看看当时那些排在它前面、走年货路线的IP后来都怎么样了,你就明白了。」

paragraphs.en: Regardless, it has been a very, very long wait for GTA 6 — 13 years since GTA 5! — which sounds like something Zelnick had not intended either.
paragraphs.cn: 不管怎么说,《GTA6》的等待实在太漫长了——距离《GTA5》已经过去13年!听起来这也不是泽尼克本意。

paragraphs.en: "Creating some anticipation on the part of the consumer is a good thing," he concluded, noting that GTA 5 had been ticking over just fine through constant updates to GTA Online and new versions of the game re-released on newer consoles. "What has driven the gap is the amount of time it takes to do something that is as good as it can possibly be for that intellectual property."
paragraphs.cn: 「让消费者保持期待是件好事,」他总结道,并指出《GTA5》通过《GTA Online》持续更新和登陆新主机的复刻版,一直保持着热度。「真正拉长间隔的,是为了把这个IP做到极致所需的开发时间。」

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 is finally set to arrive this November after numerous delays — and Zelnick recently assured IGN that its release date is expected to stick.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》历经多次跳票,最终定于今年11月发售——泽尼克近期向IGN保证,这次发售日不会再变。

opus_summary: Take-Two老板泽尼克谈到做爆款越来越难,暗讽前Rockstar员工创办的Build a Rocket Boy出品的《MindsEye》翻车。他强调Take-Two坚持不年货化策略,并向IGN保证《GTA6》今年11月发售日不会再变。
